Module lifeline
Package model.graph

Class Edge

java.lang.Object
model.graph.Edge
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Edge extends Object implements Serializable
Represents a directed or undirected connection between two nodes in the graph. Each edge has a distance and may contain agents traveling through it.
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Edge(Node source, Node destination, double distance, int capacity, EdgeType type, boolean oriented)
    Creates a new edge between two nodes.
    Edge(Node source, Node destination, double distance, EdgeType type, boolean oriented)
    Creates an edge with unlimited capacity.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • Edge

      public Edge(Node source, Node destination, double distance, int capacity, EdgeType type, boolean oriented)
      Creates a new edge between two nodes. The edge is undirected by default, with unlimited capacity and no agents.
      Parameters:
      source - starting node
      destination - ending node
      distance - cost or distance of the edge

    • Edge

      public Edge(Node source, Node destination, double distance, EdgeType type, boolean oriented)
      Creates an edge with unlimited capacity.
      Parameters:
      source - starting node
      destination - ending node
      distance - cost or distance of the edge
      type - road type of the edge
      oriented - true if the edge is one-way

  • Method Details

    • getSource

      public Node getSource()
      Returns the source node of the edge.
      Returns:
      source node

    • setSource

      public void setSource(Node source)
      Sets the source node of the edge.
      Parameters:
      source - new source node

    • getDestination

      public Node getDestination()
      Returns the destination node of the edge.
      Returns:
      destination node

    • setDestination

      public void setDestination(Node destination)
      Sets the destination node of the edge.
      Parameters:
      destination - new destination node

    • getDistance

      public double getDistance()
      Returns the distance of the edge.
      Returns:
      edge distance

    • setDistance

      public void setDistance(double distance)
      Sets the distance of the edge.
      Parameters:
      distance - new distance value

    • isOriented

      public boolean isOriented()
      Returns whether the edge is directed.
      Returns:
      true if the edge is oriented

    • setOriented

      public void setOriented(boolean oriented)
      Sets whether the edge is directed.
      Parameters:
      oriented - true if the edge should be oriented

    • getCapacity

      public int getCapacity()
      Returns the maximum capacity of the edge.
      Returns:
      maximum number of agents allowed

    • setCapacity

      public void setCapacity(int capacity)
      Sets the maximum capacity of the edge.
      Parameters:
      capacity - new capacity value

    • getType

      public EdgeType getType()
      Returns the road type of this edge.
      Returns:
      edge road type

    • setType

      public void setType(EdgeType type)
      Sets the road type of this edge.
      Parameters:
      type - new road type

    • getPassCount

      public int getPassCount()
      Returns how many agents have completed this edge.
      Returns:
      number of completed passes

    • getAveragePassedSpeed

      public double getAveragePassedSpeed()
      Returns the average speed of agents that completed this edge.
      Returns:
      average passed speed, or 0 if no agent has passed

    • getAgents

      public List<Agent> getAgents()
      Returns the list of agents currently on this edge.
      Returns:
      list of agents

    • setAgents

      public void setAgents(List<Agent> agents)
      Sets the list of agents currently on this edge.
      Parameters:
      agents - new list of agents

    • registerPass

      public void registerPass(double speed)
      Registers that an agent has completed this edge. The speed is stored to compute traffic statistics.
      Parameters:
      speed - speed of the agent that passed the edge

    • containsAgent

      public boolean containsAgent(Agent agent)
      Checks whether the given agent is currently on this edge.
      Parameters:
      agent - the agent to check
      Returns:
      true if the agent is present on this edge, false otherwise

    • addAgent

      public void addAgent(Agent agent)
      Adds an agent to this edge if it is not already present.
      Parameters:
      agent - the agent to add

    • resetPassStats

      public void resetPassStats()
      Resets traffic statistics collected on this edge.

    • removeAgent

      public void removeAgent(Agent agent)
      Removes an agent from this edge.
      Parameters:
      agent - the agent to remove

      public String toString()
